'''鈭歯-g-n''' ('''kanagan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pene|pene]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pene|pene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| kanagan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinagan|thinagan]] || [[word:jinagan|jinagan]] || [[word:shinagan|shinagan]] || [[word:kinagan|kinagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunagan|thuthunagan]] || [[word:jujunagan|jujunagan]] || [[word:shushunagan|shushunagan]] || [[word:kukunagan|kukunagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunagan|thunagan]] || [[word:junagan|junagan]] || [[word:shunagan|shunagan]] || [[word:kunagan|kunagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunagan|thunagan]] || [[word:junagan|junagan]] || [[word:shunagan|shunagan]] || [[word:kunagan|kunagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenagan|thenagan]] || [[word:jenagan|jenagan]] || [[word:shenagan|shenagan]] || [[word:kenagan|kenagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonagan|thothonagan]] || [[word:jojonagan|jojonagan]] || [[word:shoshonagan|shoshonagan]] || [[word:kokonagan|kokonagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonagan|thonagan]] || [[word:jonagan|jonagan]] || [[word:shonagan|shonagan]] || [[word:konagan|konagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonagan|thonagan]] || [[word:jonagan|jonagan]] || [[word:shonagan|shonagan]] || [[word:konagan|konagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]] || [[word:nagan|nagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nagan|th忙nagan]] || [[word:j忙nagan|j忙nagan]] || [[word:sh忙nagan|sh忙nagan]] || [[word:k忙nagan|k忙nagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanagan|thathanagan]] || [[word:jajanagan|jajanagan]] || [[word:shashanagan|shashanagan]] || [[word:kakanagan|kakanagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanagan|thanagan]] || [[word:janagan|janagan]] || [[word:shanagan|shanagan]] || [[word:kanagan|kanagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanagan|thanagan]] || [[word:janagan|janagan]] || [[word:shanagan|shanagan]] || [[word:kanagan|kanagan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanagan|shanagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanagan|goshanagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanagan|gokishanagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanagann眉|shanagann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanagannkn眉|goshanagannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagann眉|gokishanagann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanagansh毛|shanagansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanagannksh毛|goshanagannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanagansh毛|gokishanagansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaganro|shanaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagannkro|goshanagannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaganro|gokishanaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaganmu|shanaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagannkmu|goshanagannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaganmu|gokishanaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanagansher|shanagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanagannksher|goshanagannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanagansher|gokishanagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanaganng|shanaganng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanagannkng|goshanagannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanaganng|gokishanaganng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanaganya|shanaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanagannkya|goshanagannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanaganya|gokishanaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanaganyam|shanaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanagannkyam|goshanagannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanaganyam|gokishanaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanagann眉sh毛|shanagann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagannkn眉sh毛|goshanagannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanagann眉sh毛|gokishanagann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagann眉ro|shanagann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagannkn眉ro|goshanagannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagann眉ro|gokishanagann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagann眉mu|shanagann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagannkn眉mu|goshanagannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagann眉mu|gokishanagann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanagansh毛n眉|shanagansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagannksh毛n眉|goshanagannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagansh毛n眉|gokishanagansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagansh毛ro|shanagansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagannksh毛ro|goshanagannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagansh毛ro|gokishanagansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagansh毛mu|shanagansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagannksh毛mu|goshanagannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagansh毛mu|gokishanagansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanaganron眉|shanaganron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagannkron眉|goshanagannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaganron眉|gokishanaganron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaganrosh毛|shanaganrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagannkrosh毛|goshanagannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaganrosh毛|gokishanaganrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanaganromu|shanaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagannkromu|goshanagannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanaganromu|gokishanaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanaganmun眉|shanaganmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagannkmun眉|goshanagannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanaganmun眉|gokishanaganmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanaganmush毛|shanaganmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagannkmush毛|goshanagannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanaganmush毛|gokishanaganmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanaganmuro|shanaganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagannkmuro|goshanagannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanaganmuro|gokishanaganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
